name: pr_cep_expwin_pastlo
drl: rule R when $a : A($ac : acct) $b : B(acct == $ac, this after[10000ms,20000ms] $a) then end
_finding: expires == window lo, partner ONE MS past the instant (delta 10001, deadline 10000): the anchor died strictly after its deadline passed, the join is SILENT. Control for pr_cep_expwin_atlo - the alive-AT-deadline boundary is exact.
